title: ophrys candica
intro: Ophrys candica, also known as the Spur Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The Spur Orchid has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys candica include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Ophrys candica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
